ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal in the specified currency */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project's funding */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project's funding campaign */,
  "launched_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was launched */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the project is a staff pick */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers supporting the project */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the project is featured as a spotlight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project category */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., play, musical, opera) */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "production_venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the production will be staged */,
  "production_dates" TEXT /* Dates of the production (e.g., June 1 - June 10, 2023) */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Total budget for the production */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Total cost incurred for the production */,
  "production_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the production */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL for the project's webpage */,
  "project_social_media" TEXT /* Social media links for the project */,
  "project_contact_email" TEXT /* Email for project inquiries */,
  "project_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for project inquiries */,
  "project_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "project_contact_role" TEXT /* Role of the contact person */,
  "project_additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the project */,
  "project_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and filtering */,
  "project_tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "user_website" TEXT /* User's personal or professional website */,
  "user_social_media" TEXT /* User's social media links */,
  "user_profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "user_banned" INTEGER /* Whether the user is banned */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_user" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., creator, collaborator) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_user_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_user_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being backed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who backed the project */,
  "backed_amount" REAL /* Amount backed by the user */,
  "backed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user backed the project */,
  "reward_tier" TEXT /* Reward tier selected by the backer */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "backer_status" TEXT /* Status of the backer (e.g., active, refunded) */,
  "backer_message" TEXT /* Message from the backer to the project creator */,
  "backer_shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for rewards */,
  "backer_contact_email" TEXT /* Email for backer inquiries */,
  "backer_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for backer inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the outcome */,
  "outcome_media" TEXT /* Media links (e.g., images, videos) related to the outcome */,
  "outcome_sources" TEXT /* Sources of information for the outcome */,
  "outcome_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from backers or other stakeholders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "percent_funded" REAL /* Percentage of the goal that has been funded */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average amount donated per backer */,
  "total_backers" INTEGER /* Total number of backers */,
  "total_donations" INTEGER /* Total number of donations */,
  "average_backers_per_donation" REAL /* Average number of backers per donation */,
  "highest_donation" REAL /* Highest single donation */,
  "lowest_donation" REAL /* Lowest single donation */,
  "median_donation" REAL /* Median donation amount */,
  "donation_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of donations (e.g., 1-10, 11-50, 51-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate relative to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., US, CA) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  "country_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default currency for the country */,
  "country_time_zones" TEXT /* Time zones in the country */,
  "country_languages" TEXT /* Official languages of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_tags" TEXT /* Tags for the file */,
  "file_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the file (e.g., public, private) */,
  "file_access_key" TEXT /* Access key for restricted files */,
  "file_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
